episode_event_ch0112_ch0002_specialbattl:
Of all the opponents I’ve faced, you’re the
best without a doubt.

But even though I was defeated, I won’t
change my course.

I will continue battling until I stand above
all Trainers!

Now, move on and challenge those who
stand at the top!

There you are, [Name:PlayerNickname ]!
We were waiting for you!

So you took down the Elite Four, huh!
That’s amazing!

Well, knowing YOUR skills, I guess I knew
you’d make it here all along!
Should we start our Pokémon battles, then?

Which of us do you want to battle first,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]?

Heheh. Think you can keep up with Raikou’s
speed?

Hehe! Try not to let Entei’s power
overwhelm you!

Now, as your friends and as Neo Champions
of Pasio...

...Let’s battle with everything we’ve got and
find out who’s the strongest!
